headline: AES Safety AI Rollout Puts Operational Execution And Regulation In Focus
summary: AES (NYSE:AES) has launched a large scale AI native safety platform across its U.S. utilities and renewables operations. The system is designed to speed up incident investigations, surface systemic risks, and support workforce protection. This marks one of the first major deployments of AI focused on operational safety in the power sector. AES is a global power company with a sizeable presence in regulated utilities and renewable generation, where safety and reliability are core to day to...
